title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: No mountain in Africa is higher than Kilimanjaro.

questions.firstSentence: Someone has already booked all the tables.
It's not possible for her to have made that mistake.
The documentary was so moving that many people cried.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that many people cried.

questions.firstSentence: He no longer watches television in the evenings.
Although the price was high, she bought the dress.
She told me, 'I am planning a surprise party.'
